title: No Piglin Brutes
description: Effectively removes Piglin Brutes from the game!
body:
# No Piglin Brutes

This very simple datapack/mod simply "removes" piglin brutes from the game! 

It does this by constantly teleporting all piglin brutes that are being loaded into the void.

You can check how many piglin brutes have been affected by this by looking at the `PiglinBrutesKilled` scoreboard objective.

## Mod port for 1.21.x coming soon™!
